default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Norm.ai for content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Norm.ai is building out their marketing team and planning a Q4 brand campaign as a forcing function for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [GrowthX offers expert-led, AI-powered content creation with a focus on high-quality, compliant content for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Norm.ai is interested in GrowthX's services but wants to prepare internally before committing to a strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Next steps include discussing pricing, timeline, and potentially scheduling an engagement 4-6 weeks out](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Topics

### Norm.ai Team and Content Strategy Updates

  - [New hires: Director of demand gen, senior brand designer, director of product marketing starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Planning Q4 brand campaign to drive content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Aiming for directional content strategy by end of next week, focusing on themes, audiences, and rationale](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Learned importance of rigorous review process due to industry regulations and audience sensitivities](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### GrowthX Platform and Process Overview

  - [Expert-led, AI-powered growth platform with four layers: strategy, workflows, expert-in-loop, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Demonstrated workflow execution layer, including research, fact-checking, and content creation steps](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Showcased ability to create highly specific, compliant content for regulated industries (e.g., Biologica, DUI.org)](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Highlighted importance of detailed artifacts like writing guidelines, personas, and product deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### Content Quality and Compliance

  - [GrowthX emphasizes expert review and fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Platform allows for customized workflows to meet specific industry needs (e.g., medical annotation, ingredients review)](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to handle nuanced, compliance-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Potential Engagement Process

  - [Strategy sprint involves interviews with SMEs, product demos, and review of existing documentation](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests having structured information on audiences and use cases prepared before the sprint](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Currently booked 4-6 weeks out for new engagements](https://fathom.video/share/J9iszVUtdhTxeseEkxXXJwRFnKixcZ9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
